title: The Sunny Becomes the Escape Route
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: The Straw Hats fight to reach the Sunny while Big Mom’s rage turns the sea and islands against them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you do, I'll let you eat black balls everyday.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WhaAAT?! Really?! Oh no, what should I do?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: No loyalty to your boss, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I mean, you can become such a big cloud! You can even cover the whole sky!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HyaAA! Really?! No one's ever complimented* me like that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: UWAAAAH! The trees turned back into their mischievous selves!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then let's just blast 'em out of our way as we go!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That won't work! As we try to clear a path,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll get lost! That's the sort of forest this is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yes... that forest plays havoc with you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even I am powerless against an order from the queen!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't sit around and let myself die here- JU!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 34 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
